features.name: generate for loop instantiating parameterized submodule
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that instantiates a parameterized submodule, where the generate loop bounds depend on a parameter that could conflict with a global parameter override

features.name: verilator -G parameter override with module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include multiple levels of module hierarchy with parameters, where a Verilator -G command-line parameter override could affect nested module parameters incorrectly

features.name: structural gray counter with bit-level submodules
features.description: Code should include a gray counter implemented structurally with separate submodule instances for first bit, intermediate bits, and last bit, interconnected using generate statements
